name: Granite Speech 4.1 2B — Keyword Biased on Gold-92
short_description: Per-clip STT predictions from IBM Granite Speech 4.1 2B with keyword biasing on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips. Primary production-candidate variant.
model_description: ibm-granite/granite-speech-4.1-2b, GraniteSpeechForConditionalGeneration, HuggingFace Transformers 4.57.6, GPU bfloat16, keyword biasing via chat template prompt

files.description: Per-clip STT predictions on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips. Each line: clip_id, hypothesis, latency_seconds.
